Hypersheets

A clear view of your Hyperliquid activity across perps, spot, exotic markets and bridge, in one free unified dashboard.

Hyperliquid
Perpetual & spot trading volumes, PnL, fees and win rate.
Trade XYZ
Exotic markets, equities & memes traded via Trade XYZ DEX.
HyperUnit
Cross-chain bridge deposits & withdrawals (BTC, SOL, ETH, MON…).
Signals BETA
Detect market opportunities on Hyperliquid in real time.
Market Scanner
Multi-timeframe technical analysis on Perps & HIP-3 assets.
Farming
Volume milestones, consistency goals and activity heatmaps.
Leaderboard
Trade XYZ volume ranking and wallet lookup.
Resources
Links and key references.
Multi-wallet
Aggregate up to 20 wallets to see your full ecosystem activity.
Read-only · 100% local · No API key required
